title: sphaeralcea capituliflora
intro: Sphaeralcea capituliflora, also known as the Desert Marigold, is a perennial wildflower native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Desert Marigold include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Desert Marigold can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, allowing for a variety of ways to harness its medicinal properties.
